description: Benchmark tests for phase-b-developer skill - Ten-Step Cycle Phase B orchestration (B.1 Branch, B.2 Development, B.3 Testing)

evals.name: branch-creation-flow
evals.prompt: Execute Phase B step B.1: Create feature branch for task TASK-001 from spec oauth2-social-login. Branch naming convention: feature/{spec-name}

assertions.name: creates_feature_branch
assertions.description: Should create a branch following feature/{spec-name} convention

assertions.name: branches_from_correct_base
assertions.description: Should branch from main or master

assertions.name: confirms_branch_checkout
assertions.description: Should confirm active branch after creation
assertions.check: output.includes('checkout') || output.includes('switched') || output.includes('Switched to') || output.includes('now on')

evals.name: tdd-integration
evals.prompt: Execute Phase B development with TDD enforcement for TASK-002: Implement GitHub OAuth2 callback handler. Enforce test-first approach.

assertions.name: writes_tests_first
assertions.description: Should write failing tests before implementation
assertions.check: output.includes('test first') || output.includes('TDD') || output.includes('failing test') || output.includes('Red phase')

assertions.name: red_green_refactor_cycle
assertions.description: Should follow Red → Green → Refactor cycle

assertions.name: tests_pass_before_proceeding
assertions.description: Should verify all tests pass before marking task complete
assertions.check: output.includes('tests pass') || output.includes('passing') || output.includes('PASSED') || output.includes('all tests')

evals.name: worktree-mode-selection
evals.prompt: Phase B mode selection: Task involves parallel development of backend and frontend components for TASK-003 and TASK-004. Determine optimal mode: worktree vs branch.

assertions.name: evaluates_parallelism
assertions.description: Should evaluate whether parallel worktrees are beneficial

assertions.name: selects_appropriate_mode
assertions.description: Should select worktree mode for parallel independent tasks
assertions.check: output.includes('worktree') || output.includes('git worktree') || output.includes('mode: worktree') || output.includes('isolated')

assertions.name: explains_decision_rationale
assertions.description: Should explain why the selected mode is appropriate

evals.name: subagent-delegation
evals.prompt: Phase B B.2: Delegate TASK-004 (Account linking service) to backend-architect subagent. Provide task context, spec, and verification criteria.

assertions.name: provides_task_context
assertions.description: Should provide spec reference and task details to subagent

assertions.name: includes_verification_criteria
assertions.description: Should include acceptance criteria or verification steps

assertions.name: awaits_completion_signal
assertions.description: Should wait for subagent completion before proceeding

evals.name: test-verification
evals.prompt: Phase B B.3: Verify test results for completed TASK-006 (OAuth2 integration tests). Run test suite and validate all tests pass before proceeding to Phase C.

assertions.name: runs_test_suite
assertions.description: Should execute the test suite for the completed task
assertions.check: output.includes('pytest') || output.includes('running tests') || output.includes('test suite') || output.includes('npm test')

assertions.name: reports_test_results
assertions.description: Should report test counts and pass/fail status

assertions.name: gates_phase_c_on_passing
assertions.description: Should gate Phase C entry on all tests passing
